product: Cross-platform view sharing is now GA
tagline: Cross platform view sharing via Delta Sharing is now generally available.
what_it_does: Cross platform view sharing via Delta Sharing is now generally available. The data access and billing method when sharing views are updated. A new system table allows you to track the shared materialized data history.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Cross platform view sharing via Delta Sharing is now generally available.
